message.content:
# Construction Website Section: Testimonials

## Overall Layout & Background
- **Background**: Solid dark gray/black (#1a1a1a or similar) creating a professional, industrial feel
- **Section padding**: Generous vertical spacing (approximately 80-100px top/bottom)
- **Content width**: Centered container with max-width around 1200px, creating breathing room on sides

## Header Section
- **Testimonials heading**: 
  - "TESTIMONIALS" in all caps
  - Smaller font size (approximately 14-16px)
  - Light blue color (#4a90e2 or similar)
  - Uppercase lettering
  - Centered alignment
  - Subtle letter spacing for emphasis

- **Main heading**:
  - "WHAT OUR CLIENTS SAY"
  - Large, bold font (approximately 40-48px)
  - White color (#ffffff)
  - Centered alignment
  - Strong font weight (700-800)
  - Slight letter spacing for impact

## Testimonial Card
- **Card container**:
  - Dark background (slightly lighter than page background, #222222)
  - Rounded corners (8-12px radius)
  - Subtle box shadow for depth
  - Padding: 40px left/right, 30px top/bottom
  - Width: Approximately 80% of container (responsive)

- **Quote marks icon**:
  - Large quotation marks ("") in blue color (#4a90e2)
  - Positioned at top-left of card
  - Font size: Approximately 60-80px
  - Opacity: 0.3-0.4 for subtle effect
  - Custom icon or text character

- **Testimonial text**:
  - "Exceptional plumbing work. They responded quickly to our emergency and the"
  - Font size: 18-20px
  - Line height: 1.6 for readability
  - Color: White (#ffffff)
  - Font weight: 300-400 (light to regular)
  - Max width: Approximately 800px (to prevent long lines)

## Notification Banner
- **Banner container**:
  - Dark gray background (#333333)
  - Rounded corners (6-8px)
  - Padding: 12px 20px
  - Position: Bottom of card
  - Width: 100%

- **Banner text**:
  - "Frontend Preview Only. Please wake servers to enable backend functionality."
  - Font size: 14px
  - Color: Light gray (#cccccc)
  - Font weight: 400 (regular)

- **Button**:
  - "Wake up servers"
  - Background: Teal/turquoise (#20b2aa)
  - Color: White (#ffffff)
  - Padding: 8px 16px
  - Border-radius: 4px
  - Font size: 14px
  - Font weight: 500 (medium)
  - Hover effect: Slightly darker teal on hover

## Footer Element
- **"Made with Emergent" badge**:
  - Dark background (#222222)
  - Rounded corners (6-8px)
  - Padding: 8px 12px
  - Position: Bottom-right corner of viewport
  - Font size: 12px
  - Color: Light gray (#cccccc)
  - Contains small Emergent logo/icon

## Typography Details
- **Font family**: Sans-serif (likely Arial, Helvetica, or similar)
- **Hierarchy**:
  - Main heading: Largest, boldest
  - Subheading: Smaller, lighter blue
  - Testimonial text: Medium size, regular weight
  - Banner text: Smallest, light gray

## Spacing & Alignment
- **Vertical spacing**: Generous between elements for breathing room
- **Horizontal centering**: All text and containers centered
- **Internal spacing**: Ample padding within card for content separation
- **Consistent margins**: Uniform spacing between sections

## Color Scheme
- **Primary**: Dark background (#1a1a1a)
- **Accent**: Blue (#4a90e2) for headings and icons
- **Text**: White (#ffffff) for main content
- **Secondary text**: Light gray (#cccccc) for notifications
- **Button**: Teal (#20b2aa) for call-to-action

## Responsive Considerations
- **Mobile**: Card width adjusts to 90-95% of viewport
- **Tablet**: Font sizes slightly reduced
- **Desktop**: Maintains centered layout with max-width container

This section creates a professional, trustworthy atmosphere while highlighting client satisfaction through clear typography and visual hierarchy. The dark background with blue accents creates a modern industrial feel appropriate for a construction company.
